backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the ICP backend canister with CRUD operations for timetable slots, tasks, chat messages, sidebar items, and day entries, using in-memory Maps and auto-incrementing IDs.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that Chat.tsx was updated to call Gemini 2.5 Flash directly from the frontend via @google/genai SDK, removing ICP canister routing for chat.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend architecture.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, sidebar, and chart variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a #root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all page routes, wraps the app in ThemeProvider and UserProvider, and renders the Layout shell with a Toaster.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component providing a collapsible sidebar, mobile hamburger header, scrollable main content area, and a footer with caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/Sidebar.tsx: Sidebar navigation component with links to all app pages, a collapsible Timetable submenu, and a Gemini API key management section with save/remove and masked display functionality.
frontend/src/components/TaskModal.tsx: A dialog modal component for adding or editing a task, with fields for title, due date, and description, plus validation and async save handling.
frontend/src/components/TimetableSlotMod: A dialog modal component for adding or editing a timetable slot, with fields for subject, day, start time, duration, and location, plus validation and async save handling.
frontend/src/contexts/UserContext.tsx: React context that stores and manages the user's Gemini API key in localStorage, exposing update and clear functions via the useUser hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, recreating it when the Internet Identity changes and invalidating dependent queries accordingly.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login, logout, and identity state with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend operations including CRUD for timetable slots, tasks, chat messages, and day tracker entries.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines a teal/slate-green OKLCH design token theme for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a cn utility function that merges Tailwind class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Assignments.tsx: Assignments page that displays, creates, filters, and marks tasks as complete, using React Query hooks and a TaskModal component for form input.
frontend/src/pages/Chat.tsx: Chat page that renders a conversation UI with the Gemini API, displaying user and bot messages with typing indicators and using timetable/task data as context.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard overview page showing today's class slots, upcoming tasks, summary stats, and quick-action buttons linking to other app sections.
frontend/src/pages/DayTracker.tsx: Day Tracker page with a weekly calendar navigator that lets users add, edit, and delete daily activity entries via a modal dialog.
frontend/src/pages/TimetableManual.tsx: Manual timetable management page that lists slots grouped by day of week and supports creating, editing (delete + recreate), and deleting timetable slots.
frontend/src/pages/TimetableUpload.tsx: React page for uploading a timetable image via drag-and-drop or file picker, simulating OCR extraction of schedule slots, allowing inline editing of extracted slots, and saving them to the backend via the createSlot mutation.
frontend/src/utils/geminiChat.ts: Utility that builds a system prompt from the student's timetable slots and tasks, then calls the Gemini 2.5 Flash REST API directly with conversation history to return an AI-generated response.
frontend/src/utils/mockAi.ts: Offline fallback AI response generator that returns keyword-matched, context-aware replies about the student's schedule and tasks without calling any external API.
frontend/src/utils/mockOcr.ts: Mock OCR utility that simulates a processing delay and returns randomly generated timetable slots, plus a helper to convert HH:MM time strings to minutes as BigInt.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining the design system tokens including custom fonts (Inter, Plus Jakarta Sans), OKLCH-based color palette, border radii, box shadows, and animation keyframes, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins enabled.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 15) describing the academic management platform's architecture, existing features, known issues (Gemini calls incorrectly routed through ICP canister), and fix requirements.
